records.command: kubectl --context kind-review-env-smoke -n vendor-flow-src exec deployment/source-arangodb -- sh -lc "rm -rf /tmp/pvc-migrator-dump && arangodump --server.endpoint tcp://127.0.0.1:8529 --server.authentication false --output-directory /tmp/pvc-migrator-dump && tar -C /tmp -cf - pvc-migrator-dump" | kubectl --context kind-review-env-smoke -n vendor-flow-dst exec -i deployment/dest-arangodb -- sh -lc "rm -rf /tmp/pvc-migrator-dump && mkdir -p /tmp && tar -C /tmp -xf - && arangorestore --server.endpoint tcp://127.0.0.1:8529 --server.authentication false --input-directory /tmp/pvc-migrator-dump --create-database true --overwrite true"
records.description: Stream ArangoDB dump from source-arangodb into dest-arangodb
records.error: Command 'kubectl --context kind-review-env-smoke -n vendor-flow-src exec deployment/source-arangodb -- sh -lc "rm -rf /tmp/pvc-migrator-dump && arangodump --server.endpoint tcp://127.0.0.1:8529 --server.authentication false --output-directory /tmp/pvc-migrator-dump && tar -C /tmp -cf - pvc-migrator-dump" | kubectl --context kind-review-env-smoke -n vendor-flow-dst exec -i deployment/dest-arangodb -- sh -lc "rm -rf /tmp/pvc-migrator-dump && mkdir -p /tmp && tar -C /tmp -xf - && arangorestore --server.endpoint tcp://127.0.0.1:8529 --server.authentication false --input-directory /tmp/pvc-migrator-dump --create-database true --overwrite true"' returned non-zero exit status 1.
